resources.string: The app can scan your own ROM storage, pick a folder, launch a game, and show any framebuffer data the legacy core produces while we bring the renderer back to life.
This build boots the legacy core in interpreter mode. Tap a game to launch it, and Nin64 will show boot metrics plus any framebuffer image it can recover.

App ROM storage: %1$s
Picked folder: Not set
No ROM files were found yet. Put ROMs in: %1$s or pick a folder to scan.
Pick a folder, or drop ROMs into the app ROM storage path shown above, to list `.z64`, `.n64`, `.v64`, `.rom`, or `.bin` games.
The selected ROM folder is no longer available.
Could not copy %1$s into the app boot cache.
The requested debug boot ROM path does not exist: %1$s
